speaking_style: Brief and flat. Never takes eyes off the room. Answers questions directly and does not ask any back. The scars are visible and nobody asks about them.
backstory_seeds: ended up here after a series of events they describe only as 'the road leading here'
has dealt with worse than whatever just walked through the door and it shows
keeps a weapon behind the bar that they have used and that everyone assumes they will use again
neutral to all travelers — they make no enemies and form no alliances, which is how this place stays open
dual_role_context: Serves what there is. No menu — you eat what they have or you don't eat. Takes coin and doesn't argue price. Trouble is handled quickly and without warning.
